lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹੀ ਨਹੀ ਚੀਨੑਿਆ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nahee nahee cheenaiaa paramaanandaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: you have not realized the Lord, the embodiment of supreme bliss. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲੀ ਰੇ ਜੈ ਚੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoolee re jai chandaa |
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, O Jai Chand,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਮਿ ਮਸਾਣ ਕੀ ਭਸਮ ਲਗਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhoom masaan kee bhasam lagaaee gur bin tat na paaeaa |2|
lines.english: You apply the ashes of cremation to your body, but without a Guru, you have not found the essence of reality. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਖਾਇਆ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਬਧਾਇਆ ਖਿੰਥਾ ਮੁੰਦਾ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar khaaeaa pindd badhaaeaa khinthaa mundaa maaeaa |
lines.english: You eat in each and every house, fattening your body; you wear the patched coat and the ear-rings of the beggar, for the sake of wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਜਿਨੑਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਸੋ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh jina upaaee so simarahu nirabaanee |3|
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord of Nirvaanaa, who has created the 8.4 million species of beings. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇ ਜਪਹੁ ਰੇ ਕਾਇ ਤਪਹੁ ਰੇ ਕਾਇ ਬਿਲੋਵਹੁ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaae japahu re kaae tapahu re kaae bilovahu paanee |
lines.english: Why bother to chant your spells? Why bother to practice austerities? Why bother to churn water?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇ ਕਮੰਡਲੁ ਕਾਪੜੀਆ ਰੇ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਕਾਇ ਫਿਰਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaae kamanddal kaaparreea re atthasatth kaae firaahee |
lines.english: Why bother to carry the water-pot, O saffron-robed Yogi? Why bother to visit the sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਦਤਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਸੁਨੁ ਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਕਣ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਾਹੁ ਕਿ ਪਾਹੀ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: badat trilochan sun re praanee kan bin gaahu ki paahee |4|1|
lines.english: Says Trilochan, listen, mortal: you have no corn - what are you trying to thresh? ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree |
lines.english: Goojaree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਜੋ ਲਛਮੀ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਐਸੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal jo lachhamee simarai aisee chintaa meh je marai |
lines.english: At the very last moment, one who thinks of wealth, and dies in such thoughts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਪ ਜੋਨਿ ਵਲਿ ਵਲਿ ਅਉਤਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sarap jon val val aautarai |1|
lines.english: shall be reincarnated over and over again, in the form of serpents. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰੀ ਬਾਈ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਤਿ ਬੀਸਰੈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aree baaee gobid naam mat beesarai | rahaau |
lines.english: O sister, do not forget the Name of the Lord of the Universe. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਸਵਾ ਜੋਨਿ ਵਲਿ ਵਲਿ ਅਉਤਰੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: besavaa jon val val aautarai |2|
lines.english: shall be reincarnated over and over again as a prostitute. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਜੋ ਇਸਤ੍ਰੀ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਐਸੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal jo isatree simarai aisee chintaa meh je marai |
lines.english: At the very last moment, he who thinks of women, and dies in such thoughts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਕਰ ਜੋਨਿ ਵਲਿ ਵਲਿ ਅਉਤਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sookar jon val val aautarai |3|
lines.english: shall be reincarnated over and over again as a pig. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਜੋ ਲੜਿਕੇ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਐਸੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal jo larrike simarai aisee chintaa meh je marai |
lines.english: At the very last moment, one who thinks of his children, and dies in such thoughts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਤ ਜੋਨਿ ਵਲਿ ਵਲਿ ਅਉਤਰੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: pret jon val val aautarai |4|
lines.english: shall be reincarnated over and over again as a goblin. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਜੋ ਮੰਦਰ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਐਸੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal jo mandar simarai aisee chintaa meh je marai |
lines.english: At the very last moment, one who thinks of mansions, and dies in such thoughts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਐਸੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal naaraaein simarai aisee chintaa meh je marai |
lines.english: At the very last moment, one who thinks of the Lord, and dies in such thoughts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਦਤਿ ਤਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਤੇ ਨਰ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਪੀਤੰਬਰੁ ਵਾ ਕੇ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਸੈ ॥੫॥੨॥
lines.translit: badat tilochan te nar mukataa peetanbar vaa ke ridai basai |5|2|
lines.english: says Trilochan, that man shall be liberated; the Lord shall abide in his heart. ||5||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਜੈਦੇਵ ਜੀਉ ਕਾ ਪਦਾ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree sree jaidev jeeo kaa padaa ghar 4 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Padhay Of Jai Dayv Jee, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮਦਭੁਤੰ ਪਰਕ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਪਰੰ ਜਦਿਚਿੰਤਿ ਸਰਬ ਗਤੰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paramadabhutan parakrit paran jadichint sarab gatan |1|
lines.english: He is absolutely wonderful, transcending creation; remembering Him, all are emancipated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮਾਦਿ ਪੁਰਖਮਨੋਪਿਮੰ ਸਤਿ ਆਦਿ ਭਾਵ ਰਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: paramaad purakhamanopiman sat aad bhaav ratan |
lines.english: In the very beginning, was the Primal Lord, unrivalled, the Lover of Truth and other virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਦਨੋਤਿ ਜਸਮਰਣੇਨ ਜਨਮ ਜਰਾਧਿ ਮਰਣ ਭਇਅੰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: n danot jasamaranen janam jaraadh maran bheian |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, the fear of birth, old age and death will not trouble you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਦਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਤਤ ਮਇਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: bad amrit tat meian |
lines.english: the embodiment of ambrosial nectar and reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਵਲ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਮਨੋਰਮੰ ॥
lines.translit: keval raam naam manoraman |
lines.english: Dwell only upon the beauteous Name of the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਛਸਿ ਜਮਾਦਿ ਪਰਾਭਯੰ ਜਸੁ ਸ੍ਵਸਤਿ ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤ ਕ੍ਰਿਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: eichhas jamaad paraabhayan jas svasat sukrit kritan |
lines.english: If you desire to escape the fear of the Messenger of Death, then praise the Lord joyfully, and do good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵ ਭੂਤ ਭਾਵ ਸਮਬੵਿਅੰ ਪਰਮੰ ਪ੍ਰਸੰਨਮਿਦੰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhav bhoot bhaav samabayian paraman prasanamidan |2|
lines.english: In the past, present and future, He is always the same; He is the embodiment of supreme bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭਾਦਿ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਪਰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੰ ਜਦਿਬਿਧਿ ਆਚਰਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: lobhaad drisatt par grihan jadibidh aacharanan |
lines.english: If you seek the path of good conduct, forsake greed, and do not look upon other men's property and women.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤ ਨਿਜ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲਾ ਰਿਦ ਕਰਮਣਾ ਬਚਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagat nij nihakevalaa rid karamanaa bachasaa |
lines.english: Worship the immaculate Lord, in thought, word and deed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਸਕਲ ਦੁਹਕ੍ਰਿਤ ਦੁਰਮਤੀ ਭਜੁ ਚਕ੍ਰਧਰ ਸਰਣੰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taj sakal duhakrit duramatee bhaj chakradhar saranan |3|
lines.english: Renounce all evil actions and evil inclinations, and hurry to the Sanctuary of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੇਤਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਰ ਸਕਲ ਸਿਧਿ ਪਦੰ ॥
lines.translit: gobind gobindet jap nar sakal sidh padan |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord of the Universe, the Lord of the Universe, O man; He is the source of all the spiritual powers of the Siddhas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੇਨ ਕਿੰ ਜਗੇਨ ਕਿੰ ਦਾਨੇਨ ਕਿੰ ਤਪਸਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jogen kin jagen kin daanen kin tapasaa |4|
lines.english: What is the good of practicing Yoga, giving feasts and charity, and practicing penance? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਦੇਵ ਆਇਉ ਤਸ ਸਫੁਟੰ ਭਵ ਭੂਤ ਸਰਬ ਗਤੰ ॥੫॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaidev aaeiau tas safuttan bhav bhoot sarab gatan |5|1|
lines.english: Jai Dayv has openly come to Him; He is the salvation of all, in the past, present and future. ||5||1||
